name: Fake golang.org/x/crypto Rekoobe Backdoor
description: Typosquat of golang.org/x/crypto. Intercepts SSH passwords via modified ReadPassword method, deploys Rekoobe backdoor disguised as media files.

affected_packages.name: golang.org/x/crypto (typosquat)
affected_packages.note: Verify import path matches exactly golang.org/x/crypto

remediation: Verify golang.org/x/crypto import path is exact
Check go.sum hashes against official module
Rotate all SSH passwords on affected systems
